title: Media Library
subtitle: Manage your files and images
click_folder: Click a folder to view its contents
select_folder_message: Click on a tab above to view and manage your files.
drop_message: Drag and drop your files here
upload_invalid: File type not allowed or file too large.
delete_warning: You can restore it from Trash until it is permanently deleted.
sync_message: This will synchronize the database with the physical files on the server.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to move this media to Trash?
media_tour_toolbar_content: Use this action to rescan files on disk and realign the media library with the actual folders.
media_tour_folders_content: Each tab maps to a logical folder: images, videos, documents, archives, and more. Always start by selecting the right family.
media_tour_upload_content: This area adapts to the active folder. You can drag and drop files here or open the picker for manual upload.
media_tour_files_content: The grid shows the media inside the current folder. You can review them, reuse them in other modules, or delete them.
media_tour_initial_content: Start by choosing a file family. Once the active folder is selected, you can upload media, review the result in the grid, and reuse the files in Pages, Posts, Contact, or the Builders.
media_help_intro: Choose the right logical folder first, then upload files, and use sync only when the disk changed outside the admin.
media_help_step_folder: Start by selecting the right file family: images, videos, documents, archives, and so on.
media_help_step_upload: Then upload your media into that folder to keep the library clean and reusable.
media_help_step_sync: Use sync only when files were added or removed directly on the server.
media_batch_no_selection: Select at least one media item.
media_batch_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to move the selected media items to Trash?
media_batch_delete_warning: You can restore them from Trash until they are permanently deleted.
media_batch_delete_error: :count media item(s) could not be moved to Trash.
media_ai_index_result: AI indexing complete: :indexed file(s) indexed, :skipped already up to date, :failed failed.
media_ai_not_configured: Configure OpenAI first in Settings > Integrations.
media_ai_leave_message: Some recently uploaded files are still waiting for AI indexing.
media_ai_leave_warning: Leave the media library without indexing them now?
